settings.heading: Cricket World Cup Trophy Price & Replica Cost
settings.subheading: How much is the Cricket World Cup trophy, and how can you buy a World-Cup-style replica for your tournament? The facts, plus custom replica pricing from Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: The official ICC Cricket World Cup trophy is not sold publicly — it's a bespoke gold-and-silver cup, so it has no retail price. For your own event, custom World-Cup-style replica trophies from Meru Trophy start around ₹999 (table-top) up to ₹15,000+ (large cups). WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: What you'll pay and why
settings.text: Like the IPL cup, the ICC World Cup trophy is a one-off presentation piece, not a retail product — figures online are fabrication estimates, not a buy price. What most people want is a replica for their own tournament. We make custom World-Cup-style cups in several sizes, engraved with your event name. (See also our IPL trophy price page.)

settings.question: How much is the real Cricket World Cup trophy?
settings.answer: It has no public retail price — it's a bespoke commissioned cup, not sold to the public.

settings.question: Can I buy a World Cup trophy replica?
settings.answer: You can order a custom World-Cup-style replica for your own tournament — from ₹999 (table-top) upward.

settings.question: Do you also make IPL-style cups?
settings.answer: Yes — see our IPL trophy page for replica sizes and pricing.

settings.question: How long to make a replica?
settings.answer: Standard replicas ship in 3–5 business days; large plated cups need 7–10 days.

settings.heading: Want an exact price?
settings.text: Send your item, quantity and engraving — we'll send a precise quote, usually within the hour.
